description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, geometric design with a tall, slightly tapered rectangular form. The front face displays two drawers, each with a distinct circular handle—one in a wood finish and the other in white—set against a predominantly black surface. The sides and back are finished in solid black, while the top and upper front section showcase a natural wood grain texture, creating a striking contrast. The right side is decorated with alternating horizontal bands of black and white, adding a unique visual rhythm. The overall construction appears to be primarily wood, possibly with a laminate or painted finish, and the drawers are likely hollow inside. This piece would fit well in urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or modern apartments.
description: A tall, modern chest of drawers with a black and wood finish, featuring two drawers with circular handles and bold horizontal striping on one side.
description_view_0: The front view shows a two-tone design with a natural wood upper section and a solid black lower section, with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_1: This view reveals the two drawers, each with a circular handle—one wood-toned and one white—set in a black face, indicating the functional front.
description_view_2: The right side displays alternating horizontal stripes of black and white, giving the piece a decorative, modern flair.
description_view_3: The back is entirely black, with no visible features, handles, or decorative elements.
